cardSummary.zh: SPID is Italy’s Public Digital Identity System that can be used in workflows that involve Qualified Electronic Signatures (QES), including hash-based QES scenarios—ideal for remote signing and API-integrated platforms.

cardSummary.en: BankID is Sweden's leading electronic identification solution, enabling users to securely access online banking, government services, and other digital platforms.
cardSummary.zh: BankID is Sweden's leading electronic identification solution, enabling users to securely access online banking, government services, and other digital platforms.
cardSummary.zh-HK: BankID is Sweden's leading electronic identification solution, enabling users to securely access online banking, government services, and other digital platforms.

cardSummary.en: Swedish BankID is the most widely used electronic identity and signature solution in Sweden, developed by a consortium of Swedish banks. It allows individuals to authenticate themselves online and sign electronic transactions using a mobile app or desktop software.
cardSummary.zh: Swedish BankID is the most widely used electronic identity and signature solution in Sweden, developed by a consortium of Swedish banks. It allows individuals to authenticate themselves online and sign electronic transactions using a mobile app or desktop software.
cardSummary.zh-HK: Swedish BankID is the most widely used electronic identity and signature solution in Sweden, developed by a consortium of Swedish banks. It allows individuals to authenticate themselves online and sign electronic transactions using a mobile app or desktop software.

cardSummary.en: SwissID is a Swiss digital identity and trust service provider offering electronic signature solutions through its SwissID Sign platform.
cardSummary.zh: SwissID is a Swiss digital identity and trust service provider offering electronic signature solutions through its SwissID Sign platform.
cardSummary.zh-HK: SwissID is a Swiss digital identity and trust service provider offering electronic signature solutions through its SwissID Sign platform.

cardSummary.en: Through its scalable infrastructure and global integrations, Trans Sped supports cross-border digital signing and identity verification in over 140 countries worldwide.
cardSummary.zh: Through its scalable infrastructure and global integrations, Trans Sped supports cross-border digital signing and identity verification in over 140 countries worldwide.
cardSummary.zh-HK: Through its scalable infrastructure and global integrations, Trans Sped supports cross-border digital signing and identity verification in over 140 countries worldwide.

cardSummary.en: TrustAsia is a leading digital trust service provider headquartered in Shanghai, China, offering public key infrastructure (PKI) solutions including SSL/TLS certificates, electronic signatures, code signing, and identity verification services.
cardSummary.zh: TrustAsia is a leading digital trust service provider headquartered in Shanghai, China, offering public key infrastructure (PKI) solutions including SSL/TLS certificates, electronic signatures, code signing, and identity verification services.
cardSummary.zh-HK: TrustAsia is a leading digital trust service provider headquartered in Shanghai, China, offering public key infrastructure (PKI) solutions including SSL/TLS certificates, electronic signatures, code signing, and identity verification services.

cardSummary.en: Verifai is a Netherlands-based identity verification platform offering modular solutions for verifying customer identities through document scanning, biometric checks, and NFC chip validation.
cardSummary.zh: Verifai is a Netherlands-based identity verification platform offering modular solutions for verifying customer identities through document scanning, biometric checks, and NFC chip validation.
cardSummary.zh-HK: Verifai is a Netherlands-based identity verification platform offering modular solutions for verifying customer identities through document scanning, biometric checks, and NFC chip validation.

cardSummary.en: Veriff's platform analyzes thousands of technological and behavioral variables in seconds, matching individuals to over 10,000 government-issued IDs from more than 190 countries.
cardSummary.zh: Veriff's platform analyzes thousands of technological and behavioral variables in seconds, matching individuals to over 10,000 government-issued IDs from more than 190 countries.
cardSummary.zh-HK: Veriff's platform analyzes thousands of technological and behavioral variables in seconds, matching individuals to over 10,000 government-issued IDs from more than 190 countries.

cardSummary.en: Veriff is an AI-powered identity verification platform that enables businesses to authenticate users through document and biometric verification.
cardSummary.zh: Veriff is an AI-powered identity verification platform that enables businesses to authenticate users through document and biometric verification.
cardSummary.zh-HK: Veriff is an AI-powered identity verification platform that enables businesses to authenticate users through document and biometric verification.

cardSummary.en: VIDA is an Indonesian digital identity and trust service provider, offering electronic signature and identity verification solutions.
cardSummary.zh: VIDA is an Indonesian digital identity and trust service provider, offering electronic signature and identity verification solutions.
cardSummary.zh-HK: VIDA is an Indonesian digital identity and trust service provider, offering electronic signature and identity verification solutions.

cardSummary.en: Vietnam Tokens represent a group of hardware-based digital signature solutions issued by multiple certified providers in Vietnam, including Bkav, CA2, Fast, FPT, Smart, Viettel, and VNPT.
cardSummary.zh: Vietnam Tokens represent a group of hardware-based digital signature solutions issued by multiple certified providers in Vietnam, including Bkav, CA2, Fast, FPT, Smart, Viettel, and VNPT.
cardSummary.zh-HK: Vietnam Tokens represent a group of hardware-based digital signature solutions issued by multiple certified providers in Vietnam, including Bkav, CA2, Fast, FPT, Smart, Viettel, and VNPT.

cardSummary.en: ZealiD is a European Qualified Trust Service Provider (QTSP) that enables individuals to obtain and use Qualified Electronic Signatures (QES) through its mobile application.
cardSummary.zh: ZealiD is a European Qualified Trust Service Provider (QTSP) that enables individuals to obtain and use Qualified Electronic Signatures (QES) through its mobile application.
cardSummary.zh-HK: ZealiD is a European Qualified Trust Service Provider (QTSP) that enables individuals to obtain and use Qualified Electronic Signatures (QES) through its mobile application.
